dataCleaning.noteText: Data cleaning exclusions: 104 schools excluded before plotting (missing X: 0, missing Y: 104, invalid X: 0, invalid Y: 0, both axes overlap: 0). Counts are non-exclusive by axis. Regression and confidence bands are fit only on the 1482 included schools.
